languages.original_text: "Who are you always talking to, iron sage? I neither see nor scent anyone near you. You cannot be trading wisdom with that skull at your shoulder?"

languages.text: "С кем ты постоянно говоришь, железный муж? Не вижу и не чую подле тебя собеседника. Уж не с черепом ли ты толкуешь о премудростях?"
"Who are you always talking to, iron sage? I neither see nor scent anyone near you. You cannot be trading wisdom with that skull at your shoulder?"
languages.original_text: "С кем ты постоянно говоришь, железный муж? Не вижу и не чую подле тебя собеседника. Уж не с черепом ли ты толкуешь о премудростях?"

traits.locale_text: "Who are you always talking to, iron master? I neither see nor scent anyone near you. You cannot be trading wisdom with that skull at your shoulder?"
"Who are you always talking to, iron master? I neither see nor scent anyone near you. You cannot be trading wisdom with that skull at your shoulder?"
"Who are you always talking to, iron master? I neither see nor scent anyone near you. You cannot be trading wisdom with that skull at your shoulder?"

languages.text: 「お前はいつも誰と話しているのだ、鉄の賢者よ？ お前のそばには、姿も匂いも、誰一人として感じられん。まさか、肩のその頭蓋骨と知恵を交わしているわけでもあるまい？」
languages.original_text: "Who are you always talking to, iron sage? I neither see nor scent anyone near you. You cannot be trading wisdom with that skull at your shoulder?"

traits.locale_text: 「お前はいつも誰と話しているのだ、鉄の賢者よ？ お前のそばには、姿も匂いも、誰一人として感じられん。まさか、肩のその頭蓋骨と知恵を交わしているわけでもあるまい？」

languages.text: “钢铁贤者，你老是在跟谁说话呢？我没看见也没闻见你身边有人啊。你总不会是在跟你肩膀上那颗头骨交流智慧吧？”
languages.original_text: "Who are you always talking to, iron sage? I neither see nor scent anyone near you. You cannot be trading wisdom with that skull at your shoulder?"

traits.locale_text: “钢铁贤者，你老是在跟谁说话呢？我没看见也没闻见你身边有人啊。你总不会是在跟你肩膀上那颗头骨交流智慧吧？”

languages.text: "Mit wem redet Ihr die ganze Zeit, Eisenweiser? Ich kann in Eurer Nähe niemanden sehen oder riechen. Ihr unterhaltet Euch doch nicht etwa mit dem Schädel auf Eurer Schulter?"
languages.original_text: "Who are you always talking to, iron sage? I neither see nor scent anyone near you. You cannot be trading wisdom with that skull at your shoulder?"

traits.locale_text: "Mit wem redet Ihr die ganze Zeit, Eisenweiser? Ich kann in Eurer Nähe niemanden sehen oder riechen. Ihr unterhaltet Euch doch nicht etwa mit dem Schädel auf Eurer Schulter?"

languages.text: « À qui parlez-vous toujours, sage de fer ? Je ne vois ni ne sens personne près de vous. Vous ne discutez tout de même pas avec le crâne près de votre épaule ? »
languages.original_text: "Who are you always talking to, iron sage? I neither see nor scent anyone near you. You cannot be trading wisdom with that skull at your shoulder?"

traits.locale_text: « À qui parlez-vous toujours, sage de fer ? Je ne vois ni ne sens personne près de vous. Vous ne discutez tout de même pas avec le crâne près de votre épaule ? »

languages.text: «¿Con quién habla, sabio de metal? Ni veo ni huelo a nadie cerca de usted. ¿Acaso está compartiendo su sabiduría con el cráneo que flota junto a su hombro?».
languages.original_text: "Who are you always talking to, iron sage? I neither see nor scent anyone near you. You cannot be trading wisdom with that skull at your shoulder?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Con quién habla, sabio de metal? Ni veo ni huelo a nadie cerca de usted. ¿Acaso está compartiendo su sabiduría con el cráneo que flota junto a su hombro?».

languages.text: "Sürekli kiminle konuşuyorsun demir âlim? Yakınında ne birini görüyor ne de kokusunu alıyorum. Omuzundaki o kafatasıyla bilgelik takası yapıyor olamazsın herhâlde?"
languages.original_text: "Who are you always talking to, iron sage? I neither see nor scent anyone near you. You cannot be trading wisdom with that skull at your shoulder?"

traits.locale_text: "Sürekli kiminle konuşuyorsun demir âlim? Yakınında ne birini görüyor ne de kokusunu alıyorum. Omuzundaki o kafatasıyla bilgelik takası yapıyor olamazsın herhâlde?"
